reviewers.summary: No blocking findings. Advisory: isCeiling is single-caller, FindProjectDir swallows errors, zero callers for FindProjectDir and ExitPartialFailure (deliberate foundation-laying per phased plan).

Architecturally sound. Package placement appropriate alongside internal/config and internal/userconfig. Clean dependency direction. TOML parsing follows established patterns. Advisory: EnvCeilingPaths in project vs config package is acceptable.
No blocking findings. Code is clear, well-documented, and follows codebase conventions.
